tools.name: search_research_sources
tools.description: Search for current methods, packages, guidelines, benchmarks, release notes, or literature relevant to the current file or workflow stage.

tools.name: fetch_research_source
tools.description: Fetch a source page or document to inspect exact source text, version notes, or methods guidance before promoting claims or drafting policy.

tools.name: record_evidence_item
tools.description: Record a single evidence item discovered during research. Each evidence item must be recorded before it can be cited by claims.

tools.name: submit_best_practice_stage_profiles
tools.description: Submit the generalized stage taxonomy, admissibility rules, empirical requirement flags, and allowed metric families before screening candidates.

tools.name: submit_best_practice_evidence_claims
tools.description: Submit candidate-definition summaries, literature-eligibility decisions, evaluations, and evidence-linked claims before empirical ranking.

tools.name: submit_best_practice_empirical_results
tools.description: Submit empirical screening, robustness, downstream testability, and targeted-refinement records for stage-aware best-practice discovery.

tools.name: submit_best_practice_plans
tools.description: Submit validation and reproducibility plans that explicitly reference the generalized best-practice cycle artifacts.

tools.name: submit_best_practice_branch_lock
tools.description: Submit final primary and sensitivity branch locks, including divergence records when execution differs from the promoted mode.

tools.name: submit_best_practice_determination
tools.description: Submit the complete best-practice determination after stage profiles, evidence claims, empirical results, plans, and branch locks are all in place.
